Class ServerEvent

java.lang.Object
org.bukkit.event.Event
org.bukkit.event.server.ServerEvent
Direct Known Subclasses:
BroadcastMessageEvent, MapInitializeEvent, PluginEvent, ServerCommandEvent, ServerListPingEvent, ServerLoadEvent, ServiceEvent
public abstract class ServerEvent extends Event
